declarations.description: This class represents an Animation element, extending the WJElement class.
declarations.name: Animation

parameters.description: The new value for the animations property.
parameters.name: value

members.name: className
members.description: The class name for the Animation element.

members.name: setupAttributes
members.description: Method to setup attributes for the Animation element.

members.name: draw

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the element is drawn.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: The store containing the state of the element.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: The parameters for drawing the element.

members.description: Method to draw the Animation element.

members.name: afterDraw
members.description:
Method to perform actions after the Animation element is drawn.
This method destroys any existing animation, fetches a new animations array,
selects the appropriate animation, and applies it to the element.

members.name: destroyAnimation
members.description: Method to destroy the current animation.

members.name: getAnimationsArray
members.description: Method to fetch and parse the animations array from a CSS file.
